content: We can design a purpose-built autonomous AI agent that acts as a personalized streaming learning coach for trainee intensivists in ICM training, filling the gap of generic, unguided national training pathways by continuously processing on-demand clinical experience streaming inputs and generating tailored development milestones. This agent would dynamically revalidate a trainee’s progress over time, aligned with credentialing requirements, by leveraging generative AI to scaffold reflective practice entries and competency tracking.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
